test_cases.test_case: Log in with valid credentials as standard_user
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
steps: 1. Enter 'standard_user' in the Username field
2. Enter 'secret_sauce' in the Password field
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log in with an empty username
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
steps: 1. Leave the Username field empty
2. Enter 'secret_sauce' in the Password field
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Epic sadface: Username is required.'; the user remains on the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log in with an empty password
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
steps: 1. Enter 'standard_user' in the Username field
2. Leave the Password field empty
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Epic sadface: Password is required.'; the user remains on the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log in with invalid credentials
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
steps: 1. Enter 'invalid_user' in the Username field
2. Enter 'wrong_password' in the Password field
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service.'; the user remains on the login page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log in with the locked-out user account
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
steps: 1. Enter 'locked_out_user' in the Username field
2. Enter 'secret_sauce' in the Password field
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'; the user remains on the login page

test_cases.test_case: Log in with maximum length username and password
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
steps: 1. Enter a username with maximum allowed length (e.g., 20 characters) in the Username field
2. Enter 'secret_sauce' in the Password field
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory page

test_cases.test_case: Log in with minimum length username and password
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs login page
steps: 1. Enter a single character in the Username field
2. Enter a single character in the Password field
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service.'; the user remains on the login page

test_cases.test_case: Add a product to the cart and verify the cart badge count
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
Product Inventory page is displayed
steps: 1. Click 'Add to cart' for a product
2. Observe the cart badge in the header
test_cases.expected_result: The cart badge count increases by one; the 'Add to cart' button changes to 'Remove'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to add a product to the cart when not logged in
preconditions: User is on the Product Inventory page
User is not logged in
steps: 1. Click 'Add to cart' for a product
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user must log in to add items to the cart; the cart badge remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Sort products by price and verify the order
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
Product Inventory page is displayed with multiple products
steps: 1. Select 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown
2. Observe the order of products displayed
3. Select 'Price (high to low)' from the sort dropdown
4. Observe the order of products displayed
test_cases.expected_result: Products are displayed in ascending order when sorted by price (low to high) and in descending order when sorted by price (high to low)

test_cases.test_case: Add and remove the same product multiple times
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
Product Inventory page is displayed
steps: 1. Click 'Add to cart' for a product
2. Click 'Remove' for the same product
3. Click 'Add to cart' for the product again
4. Click 'Remove' for the product again
test_cases.expected_result: The cart badge count reflects the correct number of items (0 after removal); the 'Add to cart' button changes to 'Remove' and back correctly

test_cases.test_case: Add a product to the cart from the Product Detail page
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
User is on the Product Detail page of a selected product
steps: 1. Click the 'Add to cart' button
test_cases.expected_result: The button changes to 'Remove'; the cart badge count increases by 1

test_cases.test_case: Navigate back to the Product Inventory page from the Product Detail page
preconditions: User is on the Product Detail page
steps: 1. Click the 'Back to products' button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to add a product to the cart when not logged in
preconditions: User is on the Product Detail page of a selected product
User is not logged in
steps: 1. Click the 'Add to cart' button
test_cases.expected_result: User is prompted to log in before adding the product to the cart; remains on the Product Detail page

test_cases.test_case: Add a product to the cart and immediately remove it
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
User is on the Product Detail page of a selected product
steps: 1. Click the 'Add to cart' button
2. Click the 'Remove' button
test_cases.expected_result: The button changes back to 'Add to cart'; the cart badge count decreases by 1

test_cases.test_case: View items in the shopping cart
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
At least one product has been added to the cart
steps: 1. Click the shopping cart icon to navigate to the Shopping Cart page
test_cases.expected_result: The Shopping Cart page displays the items added to the cart with their quantity, description, and 'Remove' buttons.

test_cases.test_case: Remove an item from the shopping cart
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
At least one product has been added to the cart
steps: 1. Click the shopping cart icon to navigate to the Shopping Cart page
2. Click the 'Remove' button for an item in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: The item is removed from the cart, and the cart updates to reflect the change.

test_cases.test_case: Continue shopping from the shopping cart
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
At least one product has been added to the cart
steps: 1. Click the shopping cart icon to navigate to the Shopping Cart page
2. Click 'Continue Shopping'
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory page.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to checkout with an empty cart
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
Cart is empty
steps: 1. Click the shopping cart icon to navigate to the Shopping Cart page
2. Click 'Checkout'
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the cart is empty; the user remains on the Shopping Cart page.

test_cases.test_case: Add maximum number of items to the cart and verify the display
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
Cart is empty
steps: 1. On the Product Inventory page, add the maximum number of products available to the cart
2. Click the shopping cart icon to navigate to the Shopping Cart page
test_cases.expected_result: The Shopping Cart page displays all items added with correct quantities and 'Remove' buttons for each item.

test_cases.test_case: Successfully complete the checkout information form
preconditions: User is on the Checkout Information page
steps: 1. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
2. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
3. Enter '12345' in the Zip/Postal Code field
4. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: User is navigated to the Overview page with the order summary displayed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to continue with missing First Name
preconditions: User is on the Checkout Information page
steps: 1. Leave the First Name field empty
2. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
3. Enter '12345' in the Zip/Postal Code field
4. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Error: First Name is required'; user remains on the Checkout Information page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to continue with missing Last Name
preconditions: User is on the Checkout Information page
steps: 1. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
2. Leave the Last Name field empty
3. Enter '12345' in the Zip/Postal Code field
4. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Error: Last Name is required'; user remains on the Checkout Information page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to continue with missing Zip/Postal Code
preconditions: User is on the Checkout Information page
steps: 1. Enter 'John' in the First Name field
2. Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
3. Leave the Zip/Postal Code field empty
4. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: An error banner is displayed with the message 'Error: Postal Code is required'; user remains on the Checkout Information page

test_cases.test_case: Submit the checkout information form with maximum length inputs
preconditions: User is on the Checkout Information page
steps: 1. Enter 'JohnJohnJohnJohn' in the First Name field (maximum length)
2. Enter 'DoeDoeDoeDoe' in the Last Name field (maximum length)
3. Enter '123456789' in the Zip/Postal Code field (maximum length)
4. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: User is navigated to the Overview page with the order summary displayed

test_cases.test_case: Submit the checkout information form with empty fields
preconditions: User is on the Checkout Information page
steps: 1. Leave the First Name field empty
2. Leave the Last Name field empty
3. Leave the Zip/Postal Code field empty
4. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: Error banners are displayed for all required fields; user remains on the Checkout Information page

test_cases.test_case: Complete the checkout process from the overview page
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
At least one item in the cart
steps: 1. Review the order summary on the Overview page
2. Click Finish
test_cases.expected_result: Confirmation page displays 'Thank you for your order!'; the cart badge is no longer visible

test_cases.test_case: Click Cancel on the overview page
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
At least one item in the cart
steps: 1. Review the order summary on the Overview page
2. Click Cancel
test_cases.expected_result: User is navigated back to the Shopping Cart page; no order is completed

test_cases.test_case: Verify totals with maximum item quantities
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
Cart contains maximum allowable items
steps: 1. Review the order summary on the Overview page
2. Verify that Item total, Tax, and Total are calculated correctly
test_cases.expected_result: The totals section displays accurate calculations based on maximum item quantities

test_cases.test_case: View confirmation message after successful checkout
preconditions: User has completed the checkout process
steps: 1. Navigate to the confirmation page after finishing the checkout
2. Observe the success message displayed on the page
3. Click the 'Back Home' button
test_cases.expected_result: The confirmation message 'Thank you for your order!' is displayed; the user is redirected to the Product Inventory page and the cart is cleared

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to access confirmation page without completing checkout
preconditions: User is on the Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Try to navigate directly to the confirmation page via URL
2. Observe the response from the system
test_cases.expected_result: The user is redirected to the login page or an error message is displayed indicating that the checkout process must be completed first

test_cases.test_case: Check confirmation page after multiple rapid checkouts
preconditions: User has completed multiple checkouts in quick succession
steps: 1. Complete a checkout process
2. Immediately complete another checkout process
3. Navigate to the confirmation page after the second checkout
test_cases.expected_result: The confirmation message is displayed for the second checkout; the cart is cleared and the user can navigate back to the Product Inventory page without issues

test_cases.test_case: Successfully log out and return to the login page
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user
steps: 1. Click the menu icon in the top left corner
2. Select 'Logout' from the menu
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page; the session is ended

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to access protected pages after logout
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user
User has logged out
steps: 1. Try to navigate to the Inventory page
2. Try to navigate to the Cart page
3. Try to navigate to the Checkout page
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page for each attempt; access to protected pages is denied

test_cases.test_case: Log out multiple times in quick succession
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user
steps: 1. Click the menu icon in the top left corner
2. Select 'Logout' from the menu
3. Immediately click 'Logout' again from the login page
test_cases.expected_result: User remains on the login page without any errors; session is still ended

test_cases.test_case: Reset app state with items in the cart
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
At least one product has been added to the cart
steps: 1. Click the menu icon in the top left corner
2. Select 'Reset App State' from the menu
test_cases.expected_result: The cart is cleared, the cart badge is no longer visible, and all 'Add to cart' buttons are reset to their original state

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to reset app state when not logged in
preconditions: User is on the Swag Labs main page
User is not logged in
steps: 1. Click the menu icon in the top left corner
2. Select 'Reset App State' from the menu
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user must be logged in to reset the app state; the app state remains unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Reset app state with an empty cart
preconditions: User logged in as standard_user
Cart is empty
steps: 1. Click the menu icon in the top left corner
2. Select 'Reset App State' from the menu
test_cases.expected_result: The app state remains unchanged; the cart badge is still not visible and all buttons remain in their default state
